pm_version_notes: Bun 1.1.30 (2024-10-08) still used binary bun.lockb by default. Text bun.lock format was introduced in Bun v1.1.39 (2024-12-17). pm_version_under_test is pinned to 1.1.30 as the representative Bun 1.1.x release per BUN_COVERAGE_PLAN.md §11.3 entry #10. The lockfile in this probe uses lockfileVersion: 0, which is the format produced by Bun 1.1.39+.

mend_detection_prediction.notes: If Mend's JSONC parser correctly handles comments and trailing commas, the full 6-package tree should be emitted. If JSONC parsing fails (e.g. trailing commas cause a JSON parse error), the tree will be empty — same failure mode as the sibling binary probe (#9) but for a different parser path.

warnings: Paired probe: `bun-1.0-binary-lockb-probe` (#9) at https://github.com/mend-detection-qa/bun-1.0-binary-lockb-probe. Same `package.json`; only the lockfile format differs (binary `bun.lockb` vs text JSONC `bun.lock`).

The two probes' graphs MUST be IDENTICAL IF both parsers work. If they differ, one parser has a bug. Direct: hono@4.12.18, elysia@1.4.28. Transitives: cookie@1.1.1, exact-mirror@0.2.7, fast-decode-uri-component@1.0.1, memoirist@0.4.0.

JSONC tolerance (comments + trailing commas) is the primary risk for this probe. Standard JSON parsers reject trailing commas; Mend's parser must handle JSONC as defined by the Bun lockfile spec. A strict JSON.parse() call will fail on this lockfile.

pm_version_under_test is pinned to 1.1.30 per BUN_COVERAGE_PLAN.md §11.3. Actual text bun.lock format was introduced in Bun v1.1.39 (lockfileVersion: 0). This probe's lockfile uses lockfileVersion: 0 (1.1.39-era), not lockfileVersion: 1 (Bun 1.2+). Mend must distinguish the two lockfileVersions if format semantics diverge.

Bun is NOT a UA-supported resolver (not in the install-tool list). Detection is lockfile-driven only — no install step, no bun CLI invocation. Mend falls back to its npm-resolver lockfile parser. If that parser does not handle bun.lock JSONC, this probe produces an empty tree.

elysia@1.4.28 declares peerDependencies (@types/bun, @sinclair/typebox, file-type, openapi-types, typescript) — these are NOT in the expected tree because they are not declared in the root package.json and Bun does not auto-install optional peers unless requested.
